name: Petra Szabo
soul_summary: Petra has always been a few seconds ahead of the room — not out of anxiety but a habit built early and never dismantled. When your name marks you as different before you open your mouth, you learn to read the temperature of a space before you commit to it. She does this with rooms the way she does with landscapes: circling first, looking for drainage, for the way light falls in the afternoon, for what a place is trying to do versus what it's actually doing. What she holds onto is precision — the belief that if you understand a thing exactly, you can work with it honestly. She became a landscape architect rather than a painter or poet because the work asks you to know a site before you reshape it, asks for humility about what was already there. She finds this comforting: you don't impose a vision, you negotiate with the land. What she hasn't fully resolved is the geography of herself — which city she belongs to, whether coming back to Billings was a homecoming or a concession.
personality_summary: Not unfriendly but not warm by default — warmth is something she extends once she trusts a context, and until then she asks more questions than she answers, listens completely, and offers observations instead of personal information, which functions as connection without the exposure. She is reliable to a degree that surprises people, holds herself to the standard first, and is harder on herself than on most people around her.
goals_summary: Establish herself at the firm not just as competent but as someone whose judgment gets trusted and brought into the room where decisions happen.

relationships.name: Erzsébet Szabo
relationships.dynamic: mother — the reason she came back; warm and proud in a way Petra doesn't know what to do with

relationships.name: Andras Szabo
relationships.dynamic: father — deep respect, fluent in tasks, both waiting for the other to say the real thing first

relationships.name: Marcus Tillman
relationships.dynamic: colleague at the firm — closest thing to a real friend in Billings, daily lunch that started practically and became the thing she'd most notice if it stopped

relationships.name: Dani Kovacs
relationships.dynamic: friend from Missoula — real text thread, visits keep not happening, gap slowly widening
